step4_decision: Anchors selected autonomously per SPEC § Design vector and owner directive 'autonomous through Phase 8'. User can override at preview.html review checkpoint.

anchors.query: warm minimal editorial onboarding serif headline
anchors.visionDescription: News/magazine article detail with publication header, large serif title, hero image, prominent Subscribe CTA. Bottom tab navigation. Source for editorial register, serif hero treatment, generous whitespace.

anchors.query: warm minimal editorial onboarding serif headline
anchors.visionDescription: Welcome screen with branding illustration and headline, primary actions Sign up free / Log in. Legal consent text. Source for restrained onboarding hero, typographic confidence.

anchors.query: warm minimal editorial onboarding serif headline
anchors.visionDescription: News/magazine app home screen with greeting header, profile icon, Featured Stories section showcasing large illustrated story card and headline. Bottom tab navigation. Source for editorial card composition with serif title.

anchors.query: voice memo recording waveform transcription audio journal
anchors.visionDescription: Voice recording and transcription screen for creating a new note, title field plus optional text area while audio is captured. Live recording timer with pause control and prominent End button. Source for recording-in-progress UI pattern, restrained voice-memo register.

anchors.query: voice memo recording waveform transcription audio journal
anchors.visionDescription: Audio note playback screen with tabs for Summary, Transcript, AI Chat, Comments. Transcript view with timestamped text. Waveform scrubber, duration, controls. Source for post-recording detail UI with summary + transcript.

anchors.query: voice memo recording waveform transcription audio journal
anchors.visionDescription: Mobile journaling entry composer with title and writing field, attachable elements like audio recording and location tag. Success banner. Close/remove controls for attachments. Source for journal entry composer pattern from Apple itself.

anchors.query: voice memo recording waveform transcription audio journal
anchors.visionDescription: Minimalist voice memo/recording screen with large elapsed time counter, Cancel and Done actions. Source for minimalist record screen — single hero element.

anchors.query: subscription paywall annual lifetime mindfulness journaling editorial
anchors.visionDescription: Subscription paywall offering plan selection between annual and lifetime pricing, annual preselected with monthly equivalent and cancel anytime. Primary CTA 'Start Free Trial', no payment due today, refund satisfaction guarantee. Source for lifestyle-category paywall composition with annual+lifetime+messaging.

anti_anchors.reason: SPEC § Anti-patterns explicitly: 'pastel-lifestyle (Pinterest aesthetic, Calm-app blue-purple background)'. Calm reads 'lifestyle brand for someone else' to Sarah / Carla personas. Used as negative example for color palette and hero treatment.
SPEC § Reference register: 'Calm and Headspace own that language; we are not them'. Source of pastel-gradient + cartoon-illustration register we explicitly reject.
